productDisplayName: Baggit Women Slap Crush Black Clutch
description: Toned down glam, with a special occasion twist, this baggit clutch is just right for an evening with the girls, or a surprise dinner. Match the tones on this piece with your pumps and accessories. Dimensions: 14 cm x 30 cm Shiny leatherette upper with a bow detail on the front One main compartment with a pouch and a zippered pocket Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
